articles.author: ROD MCGUIRK Associated Press
articles.title: Spearfisher mauled on Great Barrier Reef in Australia's second fatal shark attack in a week - ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
articles.description: A spearfisher has been mauled on the Great Barrier Reef in Australia’s second fatal shark attack in just over a week
articles.content:
MELBOURNE, Australia -- A spearfisher was mauled on the Great Barrier Reef on Sunday in Australias second fatal shark attack in just over a week, police said.
